ksa_text: Ability to design effective data structures, models, and schemas that balance organizational needs, technical constraints, and long-term maintainability.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of network systems management principles, models, methods (e.g., end-to-end systems performance monitoring), and tools.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data warehousing principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of network systems management principles, models, methods (e.g., end-to-end systems performance monitoring), and tools.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-A-003 (DQ, Ability) maps to Market Research Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4418 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.442, onet=0.403, eu_ai_act=0.390. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4418 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-A-003 (DQ, composite 0.4418) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles does not surface this DQ-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4418 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DQ domain content at composite 0.4418 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4418, domain DQ. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
